zh.lifeSummary: 當Bolesław I Wysoki Piast於1127年出生時，他的父親Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast22歲，母親Agnes von Babenberg25歲。他於大約1141年與Swinisława Rurykowicz結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1201年12月7日享年74歲，埋葬在德國薩辛-安哈爾特波格藍德可萊斯巴德 可森。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bolesław I Wysoki Piast于1127年出生时，他的父亲Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast22岁，母亲Agnes von Babenberg25岁。他于大约1141年与Swinisława Rurykowicz结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1201年12月7日享年74岁，埋葬在德国薩辛-安哈爾特波格藍德可萊斯巴德 可森。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: Wysoki
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Krzysztof, Boguslaw, Grzegorz, Piotr, Ryszard, Tadeusz, Aleksander, Casimir, Ewa, Franciszek, Jacek.
Polish and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from any of various places called with wysoki ‘high’, such as Wysocko, Wysoka, and Wysokie.

en.lifeSummary: When Bolesław I Wysoki Piast was born in 1127, his father, Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast, was 22 and his mother, Agnes von Babenberg, was 25. He married Swinisława Rurykowicz about 1141. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 7 December 1201, at the age of 74, and was buried in Bad Kösen, Burgenlandkreis, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bolesław I Wysoki Piast est né en 1127, son père, Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Babenberg, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Swinisława Rurykowicz environ 1141. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 décembre 1201, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Bad Kösen, Burgenlandkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bolesław I Wysoki Piast 1127 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast 22 und seine Mutter Agnes von Babenberg 25. Er hat um 1141 Swinisława Rurykowicz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. Dezember 1201 im Alter von 74 Jahren und wurde in Bad Kösen, Burgenlandkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bolesław I Wysoki Piast è nato il nel 1127, il suo padre, Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Agnes von Babenberg, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Swinisława Rurykowicz circa 1141. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 dicembre 1201, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Bad Kösen, Burgenlandkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania.

ja.Bad Kösen, Burgenlandkreis, Saxony-Anhal: ドイツサチセン-アンハルトブルジェンランドクレイスバド クoセン

ja.lifeSummary: Bolesław I Wysoki Piastが1127年に生まれた時，父Władysław II Wygnaniec Piastは22歳，母Agnes von Babenbergは25歳であった。約1141年にSwinisława Rurykowiczと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1201年12月7日に74歳で死去し，ドイツサチセン-アンハルトブルジェンランドクレイスバド クoセンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bolesław I Wysoki Piast(이)가 1127년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes von Babenberg(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1141년 Swinisława Rurykowicz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1201년 12월 7일 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센-아할트 버겐랜드크레이스 바드 ko센에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bolesław I Wysoki Piast nasceu em 1127, seu pai, Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Babenberg, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Swinisława Rurykowicz aproximadamente 1141. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1201, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Bad Kösen, Burgenlandkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bolesław I Wysoki Piast родился в 1127 г., его отцу по имени Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Babenberg, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Swinisława Rurykowicz около 1141 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 7 декабря 1201 г. в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности бад кoсен, бурдженландкрис, сачсен-анэлт, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bolesław I Wysoki Piast nació en 1127, su papá, Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Agnes von Babenberg, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Swinisława Rurykowicz aproximadamente 1141. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1201, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Bad Kösen, Burgenlandkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania.
